Autoclose has been disabled for this ticket.

commands.panel: Create a ticket panel (buttons or dropdown).
commands.panelId: ID of the panel to spawn.
commands.panelAutoUpdate: Automatically update this panel when edited.
commands.ticketId: ID of the ticket to create.
commands.deleteNoTranscript: Delete ticket without saving a transcript.
commands.claimUser: Claim the ticket for another user.
commands.add: Add a user to this ticket.
commands.remove: Remove a user from this ticket.
commands.blacklistAdd: Add a user to the blacklist.
commands.blacklistRemove: Remove a user from the blacklist.
commands.stats: View bot, user or ticket statistics.

helpMenu.close: Close this ticket and disable messaging in the channel.
helpMenu.delete: Delete this ticket (creates a transcript if enabled).
helpMenu.reopen: Reopen a closed ticket and restore messaging.
helpMenu.pin: Pin this ticket and move it to the top with '📌'.
helpMenu.unpin: Unpin this ticket and remove the '📌' emoji.
helpMenu.move: Move this ticket to a different option or ticket type.
helpMenu.claim: Claim this ticket to show you are handling it.
helpMenu.unclaim: Unclaim this ticket to mark it as available.
helpMenu.add: Add a user to this ticket.
helpMenu.remove: Remove a user's access from this ticket.
helpMenu.panel: Create a ticket panel with buttons or a dropdown.
helpMenu.blacklistAdd: Add a user to the blacklist.
helpMenu.blacklistRemove: Remove a user from the blacklist.
helpMenu.blacklistGet: View details of a blacklisted user.
